name: nous
description: Nous — the context graph for agentic GTM. One MCP call returns the full identity-resolved account, and bundled hooks route GTM work through it automatically.

api_key.title: Nous API key (optional)
api_key.description: Leave blank and run `npx @opennous/cli login` to sign in with your browser — no copy-paste. Or paste a key from https://opennous.cloud → Settings → API Keys. The key is workspace-scoped.

api_url.title: API base URL (self-host only)
api_url.description: Only if you self-host Nous on your own infra — set this to your API URL (e.g. https://api.yourdomain.com). Leave blank for Nous Cloud.
